atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Blood pressure is elevated

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient's symptoms of shortness of breath and dizziness are most likely an exacerbation of congestive heart failure.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient's symptoms are likely precipitated by dietary indiscretion.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient's symptoms are likely exacerbated by the heat and humidity.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient has left ventricular hypertrophy.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient's heart failure is contributing to his symptoms.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Prescribe an additional dose of lasix 80 milligrams once daily.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Prescribe carvedilol 25 milligrams twice daily.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Schedule a follow-up appointment in one week.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The nurse will administer the medications and provide patient education regarding dietary restrictions and medication adherence.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Refer to physical therapy for cardiac rehabilitation.
